
```{python}
#| label: fig-gross-income
#| fig-cap: "Gross Income over time for the nominal and today scenarios."
#| fig-subcap:
#|  - "Nominal dollars"
#|  - "Today's dollars"
#| layout-ncol: 2
# Nominal
plan.setDefaultPlots("nominal")
x = plan.showGrossIncome()
# Today
plan.setDefaultPlots("today")
x = plan.showGrossIncome()
```
